candidates_proposed.name: Non Stop Bhangra
candidates_proposed.venue_type: bhangra dance event series / performing arts collective

sample_events.title: Non Stop Bhangra at Bhangra & Beats Night Market
Non Stop Bhangra Returns to Public Works
Crash An Indian Wedding Party at Great American Music Hall

candidates_proposed.rationale: Non Stop Bhangra is the leading Bay Area bhangra dance event series, producing monthly ticketed dance parties and cultural events at SF and Oakland venues. Confirmed 2026 events include Bhangra & Beats Night Market (Jul 24, Yerba Buena SF), Returns to Public Works (Aug 19, SF), Crash An Indian Wedding Party (Aug 22, Great American Music Hall SF), and weekly OMCA Friday Nights residency (Apr-Oct, Oakland). Also hosted Holi Festival of Colors (Mar 7, Oakland). Direct WebFetch blocked by session egress proxy; events extracted from Google search index and confirmed across multiple sources (funcheap, eventsincalifornia, museumca.org). Provides unique recurring desi dance/cultural event coverage not currently in registry.

candidates_proposed.name: Dholrhythms Dance Company
candidates_proposed.venue_type: bhangra dance company / weekly class and performance series

sample_events.title: Free Bhangra Dance Classes at Bhangra & Beats Night Market
Dholrhythms Bhangra Dance Class – San Francisco (All Levels Welcome)
Dholrhythms Free Bhangra Class – Bay Area Dance Week

candidates_proposed.rationale: Dholrhythms is a professional bhangra dance company running weekly classes in SF (Tuesdays at ABADA Capoeira, 7:45 PM) and Berkeley (Saturdays at Ashkenaz, 9 AM), plus headlining Non Stop Bhangra events and curating the annual Colors of India production. Confirmed 2026 events via Eventbrite (Apr 25 Berkeley, May 12 SF) and confirmed participation in Jul 24 Bhangra & Beats Night Market. Weekly class schedule implies 8+ events/month across both cities. Note: some events are class registrations rather than traditional ticketed shows; scraper should filter accordingly. Direct WebFetch blocked by session proxy.

candidates_proposed.name: South India Fine Arts (SIFA)
candidates_proposed.location: Cupertino, CA (events also in Santa Clara and Redwood City)
candidates_proposed.venue_type: South Indian classical music and dance organization

sample_events.title: Carnatic Violin Duet Concert (Vid. Ganesh and Vid. Kumaresh)
Carnatic Vocal Concert: Vid. Abhishek Raghuram

candidates_proposed.rationale: SIFA is the Bay Area's premier South Indian classical music and dance organization (founded 1979, 47 years running), hosting multiple Carnatic concerts and dance recitals per year at in-scope venues (Quinlan Community Center Cupertino, Elizabeth Hangs Theater Santa Clara, Carrington Hall Redwood City). Confirmed H1 2026 season with 4+ events. Organization announced its full 2026 concert series lineup (Facebook post). Registry row NOT proposed because: direct WebFetch of /upcoming-events was blocked by session proxy and specific H2 2026 event dates (post-July 6) could not be confirmed in this session. Strong candidate for a future run with direct page access.

candidates_proposed.name: Carnatic Chamber Concerts (CCC)
candidates_proposed.venue_type: Carnatic classical music organization / monthly concert series
candidates_proposed.rationale: CCC hosts monthly Sunday Carnatic events supporting student artists. Clear calendar confirmed through December 2026 (Jul 19, Aug 16, Sep 20, Oct 4, Nov 15, Dec 13) plus special events (Papanasam Sivan Festival May 23-24). Excellent structured event extraction. Registry row NOT proposed: primary venue is 1221 California Circle, Milpitas CA 95035, which is outside the accepted geographic scope. One event per month in Cupertino (June 21, 2026 at 10185 N Stelling Rd) is within scope but insufficient for a primarily in-scope rating. Worth revisiting if geographic scope is extended to include Milpitas.

candidates_proposed.name: Association of Indo Americans (AIA Events)
candidates_proposed.location: San Jose, CA (Holi Fest); Pleasanton, CA (Diwali Dhamaka – out of scope)
candidates_proposed.rationale: AIA Events (25+ years, 501c3) runs the Bay Area's largest South Asian cultural festivals. Holi Fest confirmed at Discovery Meadow Park, San Jose (in scope) on Mar 7, 2026 with 20,000+ attendees. However, Dussehra Diwali Dhamaka (flagship October event) was at Alameda County Fairgrounds, Pleasanton (out of scope). Only ~1 confirmed in-scope event per year. Monthly estimate rounds to 0. Does not meet volume cutoff (≥3/month). Registry row not proposed.

candidates_proposed.name: South Asian Cultural Association of Sunnyvale (SACAS)
candidates_proposed.venue_type: South Asian cultural association / annual festival
candidates_proposed.rationale: SACAS runs the City of Sunnyvale's official Diwali Mela at Historic Murphy Avenue (230 S Murphy Ave), a large free community event in scope. However, SACAS appears to organize only this single annual Diwali event at this stage of their growth. Monthly estimate = 1 (one event per year). Does not meet the ≥3/month registry cutoff. Geographic location is solid (Sunnyvale, in scope). Worth monitoring as the organization expands its programming.

candidates_rejected.name: GCA Bay Area (Gujarati Cultural Association of Bay Area)
candidates_rejected.notes: Primary venue and HQ in Fremont, CA (not in scope). Kite Festival at 1110 Stevenson Blvd Fremont confirmed. Holi 2026 at unspecified Bay Area location. Organization serves Bay Area broadly but primary footprint is Fremont, which is not in the accepted geographic scope.

candidates_rejected.name: Bhangra & Beats Night Market
candidates_rejected.notes: Only 2 events per year: Jul 24 and Nov 13, 2026 at Yerba Buena Gardens, SF. Monthly estimate ~0.2. Location is squarely in scope (San Francisco) but volume falls far below the ≥3/month cutoff. Note: this event IS listed as a Non Stop Bhangra event on nonstopbhangra.com/events/, so it will be captured by that registry row.

candidates_rejected.name: Bay Area Telugu Association (BATA)
candidates_rejected.notes: 3-4 events per year (Sankranti, Ugadi, Deepavali, summer picnic). 2026 Ugadi held at ICC Milpitas (out of scope). Monthly estimate rounds to 0. Both low event volume and primary venue out of geographic scope.

candidates_rejected.name: India Community Center (ICC Milpitas)
candidates_rejected.notes: Located at 525 Los Coches Street, Milpitas, CA 95035. Milpitas is not in the accepted geographic scope (closest in-scope city is San Jose). Has a rich calendar of desi events but ineligible by location.
